title: pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollissima
intro: Pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollissima, commonly known as lungwort, is a type of flowering perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollissima have been used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory issues due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve coughs and congestion. The plant's medicinal properties also provide health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Pulmonaria mollis subsp. mollissima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
